cards.name: Lyria, Silver Vanguard
cards.eff: Front/once: Search 1 Draconis Lv1 Unit from your Deck to hand. GY: Recover 1 Draconis Lv≤2 from GY.

cards.name: Draconis Whelp
cards.eff: Passive: +3 ATK when another Draconis is on your field.

cards.name: Iron Sentinel
cards.eff: Passive (Back): All enemy Front Row cards lose 5 ATK.

cards.name: Abyss Specter
cards.eff: GY: Draw 1 card when destroyed.

cards.name: Celestia Archer
cards.eff: Front/once: Deal 3 direct LP damage when summoned.

cards.name: Wildlands Brute
cards.eff: Passive: +5 ATK if only card in Front Row.

cards.name: Mechspider Scout
cards.eff: GY: Draw 1 card when destroyed.

cards.name: Draconite Knight
cards.eff: Passive (Back): Front Row cards gain +5 ATK. Back/once: Negate next attack.

cards.name: Shadow Asp
cards.eff: GY: Deal 5 LP damage to enemy.

cards.name: Silver Paladin
cards.eff: No special effect.

cards.name: Storm Hawk
cards.eff: Can attack Back Row even if enemy has Front Row cards.

cards.name: Vault Golem
cards.eff: Cannot be destroyed by effects. Front/once: Destroy 1 enemy card.

cards.name: Celestia Seraph
cards.eff: Front/once: Restore 10 LP. Battle-win: Draw 1 card.

cards.name: Abyss Overlord
cards.eff: Front/once: Special Summon 2 Abyss Lv1 Units from your Deck to Back Row (free).

cards.name: Photon Slash
cards.eff: ATTACK: Give 1 attacking card +10 ATK this battle.

cards.name: Dragon Fang
cards.eff: ATTACK: Give 1 attacking Draconis card +15 ATK this battle.

cards.name: Teleport
cards.eff: TACTIC: Move 1 of your units to any empty slot for FREE (no Energy cost).

cards.name: Healing Light
cards.eff: TACTIC: Restore 15 LP.

cards.name: Reinforcement Call
cards.eff: TACTIC: Search 1 Lv1 Unit card from your Deck to hand.

cards.name: Rapid Deployment
cards.eff: TACTIC: Special Summon 1 Lv1 Unit from your hand to the field for FREE (no Energy cost).

cards.name: Mirror Force
cards.eff: TRAP: When an enemy attacks — destroy all enemy Front Row cards.

cards.name: Negate Strike
cards.eff: TRAP: Negate 1 attack completely.

fusions.name: Dragon Sovereign
fusions.formationHint: Lyria + Draconis Whelp — anywhere on your field
fusions.eff: Summon: Destroy all enemy Back Row cards.

fusions.name: Abyss Reaper
fusions.formationHint: Abyss Specter + Shadow Asp — both in the SAME row
fusions.eff: Summon: Deal 10 LP damage to enemy.

fusions.name: Dragon Emperor
fusions.formationHint: Draconite Knight (Front) + Celestia Archer (Back) — SAME column
fusions.eff: Summon: Destroy both enemy cards in the mirrored column.

fusions.name: Machina Titan
fusions.formationHint: Iron Sentinel (Front) + Vault Golem (Back) — any column
fusions.eff: Summon: All enemy cards −10 ATK this turn.

fusions.name: Celestia Dragon
fusions.formationHint: Celestia Seraph + Silver Paladin (2 in one row) + Storm Hawk (1 in the other row)
fusions.eff: Summon: Restore 15 LP and draw 1 card.

fusions.name: Wildlands Alpha
fusions.formationHint: Wildlands Brute + Mechspider Scout — anywhere on your field
fusions.eff: Summon: Destroy 1 enemy Front Row card.
